description: R/R damaged underling roof studs. 7/15/2025 AMENDED SCOPE REPAIR AND REPLACE TERMITE DAMAGED ROTTEN WOOD-STUDS AND STRUCTURAL COMPONENTS 2-STORY BUILDING NO USE AND OCCUPANCY

The proposed project involved the renovation of the 2nd and 3rd floors of two connected buildings collectively known as "The Pythian." This scope of work includes the following: • Interior Demolition: complete interior demolition of all elements on the 2nd and 3rd floors, including the removal of walls, ceilings, fixtures, and mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) systems. Demolition of existing elevator and stairs at mezzanine. • Structural Modification: Deleting and adding new structural steel to receive new ADA ramp where elevator and stair are currently located. • Conversion to Residential Units: Conversion of the 2nd and 3rd floors into residential units, with services and chases aligned vertically with the residential units on the upper floors. New Gym and Social Lounge Spaces. • Lightwell Extension: Extension of the existing lightwell to the 2nd and 3rd floors to provide natural light to the rear residential units. Partial Demo of existing concrete slab and roof system for the installation of a new roof and pedestal paver system at the lightwell extension. Steel beams modifications to accept new roof. • Exclusions: The ground floor market, lobby, bike room, floors 4-9, and rooftop are excluded from the renovation scope.

Removing steel cylinder blocks and steel posts from off the street. The building is structurally sound and has been cleared by an engineer to perform the work. See attached letter and floor plan drafted by engineer. NO USE AND OCCUPANCY
